title: Protecting Your Family's Tomorrow
subtitle: Estate planning for families with young children
tagline: Clear advice. Flat fees. Evening appointments for busy parents.
hero_concept: A warm golden-hour photograph of a young family on a sunlit porch

contact.name: Ellen Vale, Esq.
contact.address: 225 Bush Street, Suite 1200 · San Francisco, CA 94104

sections.heading: Why Young Families Need a Plan
sections.lead_paragraph: Most parents under 45 have no will. Without one, California courts decide who raises your children and how your home is divided.
bullets: Skip probate (12 to 18 months in CA)
Protect your home from forced sale
Keep medical decisions in the family

sections.heading: What We Prepare
sections.lead_paragraph: Every plan is a complete binder: tabbed, printed, and digitally backed up. No templates, no DIY PDFs.

sections.heading: Our Process
sections.lead_paragraph: Two visits. No paperwork in advance. Evening and Saturday appointments for busy parents.
bullets: Behind the scenes — draft and review

back_panel.heading: Ready to protect what matters?
back_panel.body: Your first consultation is free and takes 30 minutes — in person, by video, or on the phone. Bring nothing but your questions.
bullets: Text BINDER to 44-555 for a same-week slot
Mention this brochure to waive the $295 trust-funding fee
